options.label: Each player adds their bottom card to hand

effects.raw_clause: Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any Lead Grapple.

cards.name: American Double Punch
cards.raw_text: Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any lead Grapple.

effects.raw_clause: Draw 1 card.

cards.name: 2 Handed Toss
cards.raw_text: Draw 1 card.

effects.raw_clause: Stop any Lead Strike.
If you have fewer than 4 cards in hand, draw 2 cards.
If your opponent has fewer than 4 cards in hand, they draw 2 cards.

cards.name: $tretch Money
cards.raw_text:
Stop any Lead Strike.
If either player has fewer than 4 cards in their hand, they draw 2 cards.

effects.raw_clause: Stop any Follow Up Grapple or "Rejected!".
Your opponent reveals the top card of their deck, they may flip it.

cards.name: A Boss Photobomb
cards.raw_text:
Stop any Follow Up Grapple or "Rejected!".
Your opponent reveals the top card of their deck, they may flip it.

options.label: Each player adds their bottom card to hand

effects.raw_clause: Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any Follow Up Submission.

cards.name: American Triple Skull Slam
cards.raw_text: Each player adds the bottom card of their deck to their hand or stop any Follow Up Submission.

effects.raw_clause: If the Crowd Meter is 1 or greater, stop any Follow Up Strike.
This match has no disqualifications.

cards.name: A Welcomed Distraction
cards.raw_text:
If the Crowd Meter is 1 or greater, stop any Follow Up Strike.
This match has no disqualifications.

options.label: Add 1 card from your discard pile (best)

effects.raw_clause: Randomly add 1 card from your discard pile to your hand or each player draws 1 card. (randomly->best)

cards.name: Back Elbow
cards.raw_text: Randomly add 1 card from your discard pile to your hand or each player draws 1 card.

effects.raw_clause: Draw the bottom card of your deck.
If your opponent forces you to discard from your hand, shuffle up to 3 cards from your discard pile into your deck.

cards.name: A Head of Steam
cards.raw_text:
Draw the bottom card of your deck.
If your opponent forces you to discard any number of cards from your hand, shuffle up to 3 cards from your discard pile into your deck.

effects.raw_clause: Discard 2 cards from your hand.
Add 2 Submissions from your discard pile to your hand.

cards.name: 2 Handed Grab
cards.raw_text: Discard 2 cards from your hand.  Add 2 Submissions from your discard pile to your hand.

effects.raw_clause: If you have another Lead in play, shuffle 1 Strike from your discard pile into your deck and draw 1 card.

cards.name: Air Drop
cards.raw_text: If you have another Lead in play, shuffle 1 Strike from your discard pile into your deck and draw 1 card.

cards.name: 2 Handed Slam
cards.raw_text: If you have "2 Handed Toss" in play: your Grapple skill is +1 and this card is also a Follow Up.

cards.name: 1/4 Twist
cards.raw_text: If you have "3/4 Wrist Lock" in play: Your Submission skill is +1 and this card is also a Follow Up.

effects.raw_clause: Stop any Finish Grapple that cannot be stopped.
Your opponent's maximum hand size is -1.

cards.name: Ain't That a Kick in the Head
cards.raw_text: Stop any Finish Grapple that cannot be stopped. Your opponent's maximum hand size is -1.

effects.raw_clause: Flip 1 card.
Put 1 card from your discard pile on top of your deck.
If you have a card with "Training With" in the name revealed, you may draw 1 card and bury 1 card in your hand. (approx: revealed -> in play)

cards.name: A Forceful Display
cards.raw_text:
Flip 1 card.
Put 1 card from your discard pile on top of your deck.
If you have a card with "Training With" in the name revealed, you may draw 1 card and bury 1 card in your hand.

effects.raw_clause: If your Submission skill is greater than your opponent's Submission skill, stop any Strike.
Shuffle 2 cards from your discard pile into your deck.

cards.name: All American Headlock (Grapple)
cards.raw_text:
If your Submission skill is greater than your opponent's Submission skill, stop any Strike.
Shuffle 2 cards from your discard pile into your deck.

effects.raw_clause: If you have another Strike in play, discard 2 cards from your hand and add 1 card from your discard pile to your hand.

cards.name: A Diminished Flock
cards.raw_text: If you have another Strike in play, discard 2 cards from your hand and add 1 card from your discard pile to your hand.

effects.raw_clause: Your next turn roll is +1 for each Lead your opponent has in play.

cards.name: All American Suplex
cards.raw_text: Your next turn roll is +1 for each Lead your opponent has in play.

effects.raw_clause: Flip 2 cards for each other Follow Up you have in play.

cards.name: Abdominal Stretch (V1)
cards.raw_text: Flip 2 cards for each other Follow Up you have in play.

effects.raw_clause: Your opponent randomly discards 1 card from their hand.
Bury up to 2 cards in any player's discard pile. (targets opponent's)
If this is a Ring of Fire or Lumberjack match, double these numbers. (inert in a standard match; needs match-type state #97)

cards.name: All American Baattering Ram
cards.raw_text:
Your opponent randomly discards 1 card from their hand.
Bury up to 2 cards in any player's discard pile.
If this is a Ring of Fire or Lumberjack match, double these numbers.

effects.raw_clause: If your opponent has another Submission in play, stop any Submission.
If you have a card with "Training With" in the name revealed, you may draw 1 card and bury 1 card in your hand. (approx: revealed -> in play)

cards.name: A Beacon of Hope
cards.raw_text:
If your opponent has another Submission in play, stop any Submission.
If you have a card with "Training With" in the name revealed, you may draw 1 card and bury 1 card in your hand.

effects.raw_clause: Your opponent's maximum handsize is -4.

cards.name: A Powerful Hand Buster
cards.raw_text: Your opponent's maximum handsize is -4.

effects.raw_clause: Flip 1 card.
Take 2 cards from your discard pile, shuffle them into your deck, then draw 2 cards.

cards.name: 360 Lariat
cards.raw_text:
Flip 1 card.
Take 2 cards from your discard pile, shuffle them into your deck, then draw 2 cards.

effects.raw_clause: Search your deck or discard pile for 3 Grapples: add 1 to hand. (search+distribute simplified to 1-to-hand)
...put 1 on the top of your deck. (distribution of the other 2 simplified)
If this is a Ring of Fire match, your opponent flips 3 cards. (inert in a standard match; needs match-type state #97)

cards.name: 2 Birds, 1 Stone (Power)
cards.raw_text:
Search your deck or discard pile for 3 Grapples:
Add 1 to your hand, put 1 on the top of your deck, and bury or put the other in your discard pile.
If this is a Ring of Fire match, your opponent flips 3 cards.

effects.raw_clause: The Crowd Meter is +1.
Draw cards equal to the Crowd Meter. (approx: fixed 1 pending crowd-scaled draw / #97)

cards.name: $1,000,000 Dreamer
cards.raw_text:
The Crowd Meter is +1.
Draw cards equal to the Crowd Meter.

effects.raw_clause: Stop any Grapple.
Each player reveals the top card of their deck and adds it to their hand.
If this is a Steel Cage or Liger's Den match, you may flip both cards instead. (inert in a standard match; needs match-type state #97)

cards.name: A Rabbit Out of a Hat
cards.raw_text:
Stop any Grapple.
Each player reveals the top card of their deck and adds it to their hand.
If this is a Steel Cage or Liger's Den match, you may flip both cards instead.

effects.raw_clause: Stop any Finish Submission.
Search your deck for 1 Grapple and put it on top of your shuffled deck.

cards.name: Alpaca Slam
cards.raw_text:
Stop any Finish Submission.
Search your deck for 1 Grapple and put it on top of your shuffled deck.

effects.raw_clause: Stop any Lead Strike or Finish Strike.
Shuffle 2 Submissions from your discard pile into your deck.

cards.name: A Small Fortune
cards.raw_text:
Stop any Lead Strike or Finish Strike.
Shuffle 2 Submissions from your discard pile into your deck.

effects.raw_clause: +3 to Agility
+2 to Strike
Reveal the top 7 cards of your deck; randomly add 3 to your hand, and flip the others. (randomly->best 3)

cards.name: Cake Smash
cards.raw_text:
+3 to Agility
+2 to Strike
Reveal the top 7 cards of your deck; randomly add 3 to your hand, and flip the others.

effects.raw_clause: +3 to Technique
+2 to Agility
+1 to Submission
+1 to Grapple
If stopped, your next turn roll is -3.

cards.name: Pig Tail Swing
cards.raw_text:
+3 to Technique
+2 to Agility
+1 to Submission
+1 to Grapple
If stopped, your next turn roll is -3.

effects.raw_clause: +1 to Power
+1 to Agility
+2 to Submission

cards.name: The Iron Maiden
cards.raw_text:
+1 to Power
+1 to Agility
+2 to Submission

effects.raw_clause: turn roll exactly 3 less than target -> next roll +1
turn roll exactly 4 less than target -> next roll +2
turn roll at least 5 less than target -> next roll +3

competitor.gimmick_text:
When your turn roll is exactly 3 less than your target's turn roll:
Your next turn roll is +1;
If it is exactly 4 less, it is +2,
If it is at least 5 less, it is +3.
competitor.name: The Bull

effects.raw_clause: If your Finish roll is 6 or less, it is +2.

entrance.name: Calling in Kanik
entrance.raw_text:
Once per match:
If your Finish roll is 6 or less, it is +2.
